name: Cisco DC Networking Tools
description: MCP tools for managing and querying the Cisco DC Networking TA for Splunk
author: cisco-dc-networking-setup skill

tools.name: cisco_dc_check_health
tools.title: Cisco DC Health Check
tools.description: Check the health status of Cisco DC Networking data collection. Shows event counts per index, active inputs, and last event timestamps.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="cisco_dc_networking_app_for_splunk" disabled=0 | stats count as enabled_inputs | appendcols [| tstats count as aci_events where index=cisco_aci | eval index="cisco_aci"] | appendcols [| tstats count as nd_events where index=cisco_nd | eval index="cisco_nd"] | appendcols [| tstats count as n9k_events where index=cisco_nexus_9k | eval index="cisco_nexus_9k"]

examples.name: Run health check
examples.description: Check overall health of Cisco DC data collection
examples.expected_use: Monitoring and troubleshooting data collection issues

tools.name: cisco_dc_list_inputs
tools.title: Cisco DC List Inputs
tools.description: List all Cisco DC Networking data inputs with their status, account, index, and interval.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="cisco_dc_networking_app_for_splunk" | eval status=if(disabled=0,"enabled","disabled") | table title, status, eai:acl.app, index | rename title as input_name, eai:acl.app as app | sort input_name

examples.name: List all inputs
examples.description: Show all configured Cisco DC inputs

tools.name: cisco_dc_aci_faults
tools.title: Cisco ACI Faults
tools.description: Query ACI faults from the cisco_aci index. Shows fault code, severity, description, affected DN, and timestamps.
tools.spl: search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:apic:faultInst" | spath | table _time, code, severity, descr, dn, lc, cause | sort -_time

arguments.name: severity
arguments.description: Filter by fault severity (critical, major, minor, warning, cleared)

examples.name: Show critical faults
examples.description: List all critical ACI faults in the last 24 hours

tools.name: cisco_dc_aci_endpoints
tools.title: Cisco ACI Endpoints
tools.description: Query ACI endpoint information from the cisco_aci index. Shows MAC, IP, encapsulation, EPG, and path.
tools.spl: search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:apic:fvCEp" | spath | table _time, mac, ip, encap, dn | sort -_time

tools.name: cisco_dc_aci_health_summary
tools.title: Cisco ACI Fabric Health Summary
tools.description: Get the overall ACI fabric health score and top-level health breakdown by tenant and node.
tools.spl: search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:apic:fabricHealthTotal" | spath | table _time, healthAvg, healthMax, healthMin, dn | sort -_time

tools.name: cisco_dc_aci_audit_log
tools.title: Cisco ACI Audit Log
tools.description: Query ACI audit and change records. Shows who changed what and when on the APIC.
tools.spl: search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:apic:aaaModLR" | spath | table _time, user, action, descr, affected, changeSet | sort -_time

tools.name: cisco_dc_nd_anomalies
tools.title: Cisco Nexus Dashboard Anomalies
tools.description: Query anomalies detected by Nexus Dashboard Insights. Shows severity, category, and affected objects.
tools.spl: search index=cisco_nd sourcetype="cisco:nd:anomalies" | spath | table _time, severity, category, description, affectedObject | sort -_time

examples.name: Recent anomalies
examples.description: List anomalies detected in the last 24 hours
examples.expected_use: Proactive issue detection via Nexus Dashboard

tools.name: cisco_dc_n9k_interface_stats
tools.title: Cisco Nexus 9K Interface Stats
tools.description: Query Nexus 9K interface statistics including traffic, errors, and status from the cisco_nexus_9k index.
tools.spl: search index=cisco_nexus_9k sourcetype="cisco:nexus9k:nxinterface" | spath | table _time, interface, state, speed, input_rate, output_rate, input_errors, output_errors | sort -_time

examples.name: Interface overview
examples.description: Show interface stats for all Nexus 9K switches
